title: Fix non-responsive buttons on /pricing page

requirements.text: Fix all non-responsive button click handlers on the /pricing page (PricingPage.tsx) so that plan selection buttons, profile setup actions, and navigation-to-payment buttons all respond correctly to user interaction.

quotes: page is fully loaded but there buttons are not working
the /pricing page loads fine visually, but the buttons on the page aren't responding when clicked

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a plan tier button on /pricing triggers the expected action (profile setup flow or navigation to payment page) without errors.
All interactive buttons on /pricing are visually clickable and respond on click.
No console errors are thrown when interacting with any button on the /pricing page.
Navigation to the payment flow from /pricing works correctly after clicking a paid plan button.

constraints: Do not alter the visual layout or design of the /pricing page.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Changes to any page other than /pricing.
Backend logic or data model changes.
Modifying the pricing tiers, plan names, or pricing amounts.
